name: Ragnaros
description: A Bruiser that can nullify enemy pushes against his Forts and Keeps.
title: The Firelord
info: As the lord of Azeroth’s fire elementals, Ragnaros desires nothing more than to burn the world to ash. Banished to the Firelands eons ago, the Firelord now turns his rage toward the Nexus, intent on incinerating everything and everyone within it.

Ragnaros.name: Empower Sulfuras
Ragnaros.description: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing 191 (+4% per level) Ability damage in an area, and heals for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes.  Molten Core: Molten Swing Stun and damage nearby enemies.

Ragnaros.name: Living Meteor
Ragnaros.description: Vector Targeting Summon a meteor at the target point that deals 68 (+4% per level) damage, then rolls in the target direction dealing 272 (+4% per level) damage per second for 1.75 seconds.  Molten Core: Meteor Shower Drop a line of meteor impacts.

Ragnaros.name: Blast Wave
Ragnaros.description: Ignite Ragnaros or an ally, granting 25% Movement Speed for 1.5 seconds before exploding dealing 104 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  Molten Core: Explosive Rune Cause a delayed explosion in a large area.

Ragnaros.name: Sulfuras Smash
Ragnaros.description: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies in the center take 594 (+4% per level) damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.

Ragnaros.name: Lava Wave
Ragnaros.description: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by 100% versus Heroes.

Ragnaros.name: Molten Core
Ragnaros.description: Channel on an allied or destroyed Fort or Keep to replace it with Ragnaros's ultimate form, temporarily gaining new Abilities, having 3996 (+4% per level) Health that burns away over 18 seconds.  Ragnaros returns to his normal form upon losing all Health in Molten Core.

RagnarosBigRag.name: Sulfuras Smash
RagnarosBigRag.description: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies in the center take 594 (+4% per level) damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.

RagnarosBigRag.name: Explosive Rune
RagnarosBigRag.description: Create a rune that deals 285 (+4% per level) damage to non-Structure enemies after 1.5 seconds.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

RagnarosBigRag.name: Molten Swing
RagnarosBigRag.description: Swing Sulfuras in a wide arc, dealing 161 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning enemies for 1 second.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

RagnarosBigRag.name: Meteor Shower
RagnarosBigRag.description: Vector Targeting Summon 3 meteors at the target point that fall in the target direction. Each meteor deals 151 (+4% per level) damage and Slows enemies by 25% for 2 seconds.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

1.name: Sulfuras Hungers
1.description: Quest: Every time Empower Sulfuras kills a Minion, its damage is increased by 1, up to 25.  Reward: After killing 25 Minions, increase its damage by an additional 100.

1.name: Shifting Meteor
1.description: Each time an enemy is hit by the same Living Meteor, they take 6% increased damage from it.  Quest: Hit 75 Heroes with Living Meteor.  Reward: After hitting 75 Heroes with Living Meteor, its duration is increased to 2.25 seconds, and it can be reactivated to change its direction once per use.

1.name: Engulfing Flame
1.description: Increase Blast Wave's damage by 75% and its radius by 15%.

4.name: Fire Ward
4.description: When Living Meteor hits an enemy Hero, gain a charge of Spell Armor, reducing damage from the next enemy ability by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.

4.name: Slow Burn
4.description: Blast Wave Slows enemies hit by 40% for 2 seconds.

4.name: Catching Fire
4.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Ragnaros' Health Regeneration by 1.25 per second, up to 18.75.  Reward: After gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, activate Catching Fire to gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.

7.name: Hand of Ragnaros
7.description: If Empower Sulfuras hits at least 2 enemy Heroes, refund 10 Mana and its cooldown recharges 100% faster for 4 seconds.

7.name: Molten Power
7.description: If Living Meteor hits enemy Heroes at least 5 times, reduce its cooldown by 7 seconds, and refund 30 Mana.

7.name: Blistering Attacks
7.description: Every 10 seconds, Ragnaros's next Basic Attack against a Hero deals 60% bonus damage. Hitting enemies with Basic Abilities reduces this cooldown by 1 second.

10.name: Sulfuras Smash
10.description: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies in the center take 594 (+4% per level) damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.

10.name: Lava Wave
10.description: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by 100% versus Heroes.

13.name: Cauterize Wounds
13.description: Empower Sulfuras heals for an additional 45% of damage dealt to Heroes over 2 seconds.

13.name: Tempered Flame
13.description: When Blast Wave damages an enemy Hero, gain a Shield equal to 100% of the damage dealt for 3 seconds.

13.name: Resilient Flame
13.description: When Ragnaros is Stunned, he gains 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%.  This effect has a 15 second cooldown.

16.name: Giant Scorcher
16.description: Empower Sulfuras burns enemy Heroes for 9% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds. This additional damage does not heal Ragnaros.

16.name: Meteor Bomb
16.description: Living Meteor explodes at the end of its path, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies at its center take 30% increased damage.

16.name: Blast Echo
16.description: After Blast Wave explodes, another Blast Wave is created on Ragnaros.

20.name: Flames of Sulfuron
20.description: Sulfuras Smash Slows enemies by 50% for 2.5 seconds, and the Stun duration of enemies hit in the center is increased by 1 second.

20.name: Lava Surge
20.description: Lava Wave gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.

20.name: Heroic Difficulty
20.description: Molten Core has 25% increased Health and Damage, and its cooldown is reduced by 50 seconds.

20.name: Submerge
20.description: Ragnaros submerges below, entering Stasis and healing for 600 (+4% per level) Health over 3 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBigRagExplosiveRune: Create a rune that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagExplosiveRuneDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to non-Structure enemies after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagExplosiveRuneCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Damage increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagExplosiveRuneDamage,AttributeFactor[Minion] * 100"/>%</c> versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBigRagMeteorShower: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c></n>Summon <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagMeteorShowerInitialPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> meteors at the target point that fall in the target direction. Each meteor deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagMeteorShowerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RagnarosBigRagMeteorShowerSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBigRagMeteorShowerSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Damage increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagMeteorShowerDamage,AttributeFactor[Minion] * 100"/>%</c> versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBigRagMoltenSwing: Swing Sulfuras in a wide arc, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagMoltenSwingDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBigRagMoltenSwingStun,Duration" precision="1"/></c> second.<n/><n/>Damage increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBigRagMoltenSwingDamage,AttributeFactor[Minion] * 100"/>%</c> versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlastWave: Ignite Ragnaros or an ally, granting <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBlastWave,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBlastWave,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds before exploding dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosBlastWaveDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Explosive Rune</c></n>Cause a delayed explosion in a large area.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlastWaveBlastEcho: After Blast Wave explodes, another Blast Wave is created on Ragnaros.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlastWaveEngulfingFlame: Increase Blast Wave's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,RagnarosBlastWaveEngulfingFlame,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[10].Value"Precision="2"/>%</c> and its radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlastWaveSlowBurn: Blast Wave Slows enemies hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RagnarosBlastWaveSlowBurn,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBlastWaveSlowBurn,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlastWaveTemperedFlame: When Blast Wave damages an enemy Hero, gain a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RagnarosBlastWaveDamage,LeechFraction[Shields]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBlastWaveTemperedFlame,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosBlisteringAttacks: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosBlisteringAttacksCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, Ragnaros's next Basic Attack against a Hero deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RagnarosBlisteringAttacksDamageBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> bonus damage. Hitting enemies with Basic Abilities reduces this cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RagnarosBlisteringAttacksModifyCooldownDuration,Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosCatchingFireTalent: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Ragnaros' Health Regeneration by per second, up to .Reward: After gathering Regeneration Globes, activate Catching Fire to gain Armor for seconds, reducing damage taken by %.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosEmpowerSulfuras: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHeroicSplashDamage,Amount"/></c> Ability damage in an area, and heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasNonHeroicSplashDamage,LeechFraction[Life] * 100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Molten Swing</c><n/>Stun and damage nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasCauterizeWounds: Empower Sulfuras heals for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,RagnarosCauterizeWoundsHealerAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> of damage dealt to Heroes over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasCauterizeWoundsHeal,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasGiantScorcher: Empower Sulfuras burns enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasGiantScorcherDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100*Behavior,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasGiantScorcherTargetBehavior,Duration"/>%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasGiantScorcherTargetBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. This additional damage does not heal Ragnaros.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandOfRagnaros: If Empower Sulfuras hits at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandOfRagnarosTwoTargetCheck,Value"/></c> enemy Heroes, refund <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandofRagnarosRestoreMana,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana and its cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandofRagnarosModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandOfRagnarosCooldownBehavior,Period*100"/>%</c> faster for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandOfRagnarosCooldownBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasSulfurasHungers: Quest: Every time Empower Sulfuras kills a Minion, its damage is increased by , up to .Reward: After killing Minions, increase its damage by an additional .
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLavaWaveLavaSurge: Lava Wave gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,RagnarosLavaWaveLavaSurge,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLavaWaveTargetPoint: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosLavaWaveDamage,Amount * (1 / Effect,RagnarosLavaWaveTrail,Marker.Duration )"/></c> damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosLavaWaveDamage,AttributeFactor[Heroic] * 100"/>%</c> versus Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLivingMeteor: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c></n>Summon a meteor at the target point that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosLivingMeteorLandingDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, then rolls in the target direction dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosLivingMeteorPeriodicDamage,Amount *  (1 / Behavior,RagnarosLivingMeteorTimedLife,Period) * (1/4)"/></c> damage per second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosLivingMeteorTimedLife,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Meteor Shower</c></n>Drop a line of meteor impacts.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLivingMeteorFireWard: When Living Meteor hits an enemy Hero, gain a charge of Spell Armor, reducing damage from the next enemy ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosLivingMeteorFireWard,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosLivingMeteorFireWard,MaxStackCount"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLivingMeteorMeteorBomb: Living Meteor explodes at the end of its path, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosLivingMeteorMeteorBombDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Enemies at its center take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RagnarosLivingMeteorMeteorBombDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MeteorBombInnerRadius].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLivingMeteorMoltenPower: If Living Meteor hits enemy Heroes at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosLivingMeteorMoltenPowerTalentTokenCounter,Max"/></c> times, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RagnarosMoltenPowerModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds, and refund <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosMoltenPowerManaRestore,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosLivingMeteorShiftingMeteor: Each time an enemy is hit by the same Living Meteor, they take % increased damage from it.Quest: Hit Heroes with Living Meteor.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Living Meteor, its duration is increased to seconds, and it can be reactivated to change its direction once per use.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosMoltenCore: Channel on an allied or destroyed Fort or Keep to replace it with Ragnaros's ultimate form, temporarily gaining new Abilities, having <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,RagnarosBigRag,LifeMax"/></c> Health that burns away over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Unit,RagnarosBigRag,LifeMax / Unit,RagnarosBigRag,LifeRegenRate) * (-1)"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Ragnaros returns to his normal form upon losing all Health in Molten Core.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosMoltenCoreHeroicDifficulty: Molten Core has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosMoltenCoreHeroicDifficulty,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Life] * 100"/>%</c> increased Health and Damage, and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,RagnarosMoltenCoreHeroicDifficulty,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosResilientFlame: When Ragnaros is Stunned, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosResilientFlameArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosResilientFlameApplyResistantBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosResilientFlameArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosResilientFlameModifyPlayerCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c></c> second cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosSubmerge: Ragnaros submerges below, entering Stasis and healing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosSubmergeHeal,RechargeVitalRate * Behavior,RagnarosSubmerge,Duration"/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosSubmerge,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosSulfurasSmash: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosSulfurasSmashTargetPersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="2"/></c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosSulfurasSmashDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Enemies in the center take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RagnarosSulfurasSmashEpicenterDamage,Amount"/></c> damage instead and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosSulfurasSmashStun,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RagnarosSulfurasSmashFlamesOfSulfuron: Sulfuras Smash Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RagnarosSulfurasSmashFlamesOfSulfuronSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RagnarosSulfurasSmashFlamesOfSulfuronSlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, and the Stun duration of enemies hit in the center is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,RagnarosSulfurasSmashFlamesOfSulfuron,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second.
